hook_text: The finance director wanted to fire our software. What happened next changed everything.
body:
She'd been using three separate spreadsheets for 6 years.

One for attendance. One for leave. One to calculate payroll manually every month.

When we showed her SmartPRO Hub, she sat in silence for 90 seconds.

Then: "Show me the WPS export."

We did. One click. Formatted. Ministry-ready.

Another silence.

"How does it know the end-of-service formula?"

It calculates automatically — Oman Labour Law Article 39, correct for every contract type.

She ran her own numbers. Cross-checked three employees. All matched.

"How long to migrate our data?"

48 hours with our team handling the import.

She called her MD that afternoon.

They went live the following Monday.

The spreadsheets? Still exist — as a backup nobody touches anymore.

---

The best proof isn't a demo. It's watching someone check your numbers and find nothing wrong.

What would make *you* trust new HR software? Comment below.
rejected_reason: pre-PR#12 backlog purge — queue hygiene 2026-07-15 (regenerate via corrected pipeline)
